_doc: ★8 B-tier ITP demo (docs/13 §五·一). A bounded accumulator loop with a COUPLING invariant `sum == i`. `prove` builds three verification conditions and discharges them with the built-in Z3 — NO Dafny/Lean. This is the kind of body-level obligation `refine` honestly flags as `unchecked`; here the invariant turns it into a machine-checked proof of the functional postcondition `sum == n`.
name: bounded-accumulator

_expected.step: inductive (inv ∧ i<n ∧ i'=i+1 ∧ sum'=sum+1  ⊨  0<=i' ∧ i'<=n ∧ sum'==i')
_expected.verdict: PROVED — all 3 VCs discharged by Z3
